LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_NonAggression.label: non-aggression pact
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_NonAggression.description: A signed promise of peace. The other faction will not raid your colony while the pact holds — even hostile factions can be bought into a ceasefire, at a steep price. Breaking it damages trust across the rim.
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Trade.label: trade agreement
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Trade.description: Trade caravans visit more often and offer better terms. Also unlocks ordering specific goods for delivery.
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Passage.label: right of passage
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Passage.description: Your caravans move faster and safer through the other faction's territory.
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Tribute.label: tributary pact
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Tribute.description: Demand tribute from a much weaker faction. They pay silver every quarter and dare not raid you — but resentment builds over time.
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_TributePay.label: become a tributary
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_TributePay.description: Become a tributary of a stronger faction. As long as the silver flows, they will not touch your colony or caravans — and will overlook minor frictions. Miss the payments twice and everything collapses.
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Defense.label: defense pact
LanguageData.Rpt_Treaty_Defense.description: If your colony is raided, the other faction sends reinforcements. They expect your help in return. Requires an active non-aggression pact first.
